title: Laurie Burns
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
'''Laurie Burns''' wrote several short stories for the ''[[Star Wars Adventure Journal]]''.

{{Author-stub}}

==Sources==
===Short stories===
*''[[Kella Rand, Reporting...]]'' for [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 6]] (1995)
*''[[Ringers (short story)|Ringers]]'' for [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 6]] (1995)
*''[[Retreat from Coruscant]]'' for [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 7]] (1995) reprinted in [[Tales from the Empire]] (1997)
*''[[Conflict of Interest]]'' for [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 13]] (1997) reprinted in [[Tales from the New Republic]] (1999)
